rules.text: Grug considers {MISSION} carefully before responding with {PRIMARY_ACTION}
Grug reflects on the deeper meaning of {MISSION} through {PRIMARY_ACTION}
Grug analyzes {MISSION} with focus and precision via {PRIMARY_ACTION}
Grug ponders {MISSION} from multiple perspectives using {PRIMARY_ACTION}
Grug approaches {MISSION} methodically, applying {PRIMARY_ACTION} to find clarity
